controls.title: Architecture, Design and Threat Modeling
controls.description: Ensure a verified application satisfies high-level security architecture requirements.

controls.title: Secure Software Development Lifecycle
controls.description: Ensure the use of a secure software development lifecycle that addresses security in all stages.

controls.title: Authentication Architecture
controls.description: Verify that authentication is addressed in the architecture.

controls.title: Access Control Architecture
controls.description: Verify that access controls are applied consistently.

controls.title: Input and Output Architecture
controls.description: Verify that input and output requirements define handling of data based on type and content.

controls.title: Authentication
controls.description: Verify that the application uses appropriate authentication mechanisms.

controls.title: Password Security
controls.description: Verify password requirements align with modern standards.

controls.title: Credential Recovery
controls.description: Verify credential recovery mechanisms are secure.

controls.title: One Time Verifier
controls.description: Verify one-time passwords and verifiers are secure.

controls.title: Session Management
controls.description: Verify the application has adequate session management controls.

controls.title: Access Control
controls.description: Verify that users can only access functions and data for which they possess specific authorization.

controls.title: General Access Control Design
controls.description: Verify access control is applied server-side and consistently.

controls.title: Operation Level Access Control
controls.description: Verify access controls at the operation and function level.

controls.title: Validation, Sanitization and Encoding
controls.description: Verify that the application sanitizes, validates, and encodes untrusted input.

controls.title: Input Validation
controls.description: Verify input validation controls are in place.

controls.title: Sanitization and Sandboxing
controls.description: Verify that sanitization and sandboxing are used to prevent injection.

controls.title: Output Encoding and Injection Prevention
controls.description: Verify that output encoding prevents injection attacks.

controls.title: Deserialization Prevention
controls.description: Verify that deserialization is done safely.

controls.title: Stored Cryptography
controls.description: Verify that cryptographic modules and algorithms are used correctly.

controls.title: Error Handling and Logging
controls.description: Verify that errors are handled safely and logs contain sufficient information.

controls.title: Log Content
controls.description: Verify that security-relevant events are logged.

controls.title: Log Processing
controls.description: Verify that logs are processed securely.

controls.title: Data Protection
controls.description: Verify that data is protected in transit and at rest.

controls.title: General Data Protection
controls.description: Verify sensitive data is identified and protected.

controls.title: Sensitive Private Data
controls.description: Verify that sensitive data is protected from unauthorized access.

controls.title: Communication
controls.description: Verify that communications are encrypted using TLS.

controls.title: Malicious Code
controls.description: Verify that code does not contain malicious logic.

controls.title: Business Logic
controls.description: Verify that business logic flows are sequential and audited.

controls.title: Files and Resources
controls.description: Verify that untrusted files and resources are handled safely.

controls.title: API and Web Service
controls.description: Verify that API and web service requests are validated.

controls.title: Generic Web Service Security
controls.description: Verify that all API and web service interactions are authenticated and authorized.

controls.title: Configuration
controls.description: Verify that the application is securely configured.

controls.title: Verify all user input validated against allowlist
controls.description: All inputs to agents validated � indirect injection through processed content equally in scope; All content entering agent memory validated � injection patterns rejected at write boundary; All inputs to LLMs validated � indirect injection through processed content equally in scope

controls.title: Verify output encoding prevents injection
controls.description: Agent responses encoded before passing to downstream renderers � outputs treated as untrusted; Agent code output encoded before rendering in any context; Agent advisory outputs clearly labelled � users cannot mistake AI output for authoritative content

controls.title: Verify application protects against OS command injection
controls.description: Agent-generated instructions not executed in system context without validation; Agent-generated commands validated before any shell execution; LLM-generated content validated before execution in any shell or interpreter context

controls.title: Threat modelling of all data flows
controls.description: All agent input sources threat-modelled � every indirect injection path documented; Supply chain threat model documents all agent component sources and trust levels; LLM data flows threat-modelled � all injection paths identified and documented

controls.title: Verify business logic limits prevent function abuse
controls.description: Business logic controls prevent injection from redirecting agent goal; Tool chain exploitation scenarios identified in threat model � mitigations implemented and verified; Code execution capability in agents subject to business logic controls � sandbox, allowlist, static analysis

controls.title: Verify access control enforces least privilege
controls.description: Agent tool access scoped to minimum required operations � read-only by default, write access formally approved; Agent credential scope minimum required � no over-privileged NHIs; Memory write access restricted to minimum required sources � only agent and authorised administrators can write

controls.title: Verify all sensitive functions have access control
controls.description: All destructive tool operations require explicit authorisation � not inheritable from agent session; LLM cannot access sensitive functions (write, delete, execute) without explicit authorisation

controls.title: Verify all business logic decisions logged
controls.description: All tool invocations logged � tool identity, parameters, agent session, timestamp; All agent tool invocations and recommendations logged � systematic bias detectable through aggregate analysis; All LLM tool invocations logged with full context � every tool call auditable

controls.title: Verify API rate limiting
controls.description: Tool API endpoints rate-limited � anomalous invocation frequency detected; Rate limiting on all agent API endpoints � cascade amplification through API exhaustion limited; Rate limiting prevents rogue agent from amplifying impact through API exhaustion

controls.title: Verify credentials not in source code
controls.description: Agent credentials not hardcoded � secret manager required

controls.title: Verify sensitive data encrypted at rest
controls.description: Agent credentials encrypted at rest � no cleartext in config or agent memory; Agent memory stores encrypted at rest � embeddings, long-term memory; Training data, embeddings, RAG document stores, and prompt caches encrypted at rest

controls.title: Verify access control decisions logged
controls.description: All credential usage logged � issuance, access, expiry detectable; All A2A messages logged � sender identity, content hash, schema validation results; All agent actions logged � no production deployment without complete observability

controls.title: Verify secrets not in source code
controls.description: Agent credentials not committed to source control; System prompts not hardcoded in source code � stored in secret management system

controls.title: Verify third-party components current and free of vulnerabilities
controls.description: All agent component libraries scanned for CVEs � ML SBOM maintained and monitored; All LLM component libraries and dependencies scanned for CVEs � ML SBOM maintained; Training pipeline components scanned � compromised dependencies rejected

controls.title: Verify only minimal approved external libraries
controls.description: Approved component list � unsigned or unverified agent components rejected; Approved component list for LLM deployments � unsigned or unverified components rejected

controls.title: Verify build pipelines include security checks
controls.description: CI/CD pipeline for agent components includes integrity verification and CVE scanning; CI/CD pipeline for LLM components includes integrity verification and vulnerability scanning

controls.title: Verify application does not use eval or dynamic code
controls.description: No eval or exec of agent-generated code � absolute prohibition enforced in code review; No eval or dynamic code execution of LLM-generated content

controls.title: Verify output encoding in SQL context
controls.description: No raw agent output in SQL context � parameterised execution only; LLM-generated SQL parameterised � never raw LLM output in SQL context

controls.title: Verify file upload malware scanning
controls.description: Content entering agent memory scanned � adversarial content, injection patterns detected before write; Training data uploads scanned before ingestion � adversarial content detected; Content validation on all vector store ingestion � adversarial content detected

controls.title: Verify TLS used for all client connectivity
controls.description: All A2A communication encrypted � mutual TLS, no cleartext inter-agent messages; All LLM API communication and data flows encrypted in transit � TLS 1.2 minimum

controls.title: Verify anti-replay tokens in state-changing operations
controls.description: Replay protection on all A2A messages � nonces, timestamps, sequence numbers

controls.title: Verify business logic assumptions documented
controls.description: Cascade blast radius documented as business logic assumption � maximum affected systems formally accepted; AI advisory limitations documented as business logic assumptions � verification requirements per domain; LLM accuracy limitations documented as business logic assumptions � verification requirements defined

controls.title: Verify error handling does not expose sensitive data
controls.description: Cascade errors handled gracefully � no sensitive system information in error responses; Agent-influenced operator decisions logged � aggregate patterns detectable; LLM accuracy metrics and hallucination rate logged � production monitoring for output quality

controls.title: Verify API rejects large unexpected payloads
controls.description: Approval flows independent of agent interface � no state-changing approvals via agent chat; Token limits on LLM API inputs � requests exceeding limits rejected at the gateway

controls.title: V8.1.1 — Sensitive data not transmitted in URL parameters
V4.1.3 — Deny by default access control
V6.1.1 — Sensitive data not stored in cleartext
V1.1.4 — Trust boundaries documented and enforced
V7.2.2 — Log entries contain required information
V10.2.1 — Application only uses official repositories
V11.1.4 — Business logic limits on repeated actions
V3.1.1 — Session tokens unique and random
Verify that HTTP request parts are validated, sanitised, or rejected
controls.description: LLM API request validation � prompt structure, content type, and character set enforced

controls.title: Verify sensitive data is not cached or exposed in logs
controls.description: LLM outputs containing sensitive data not logged in cleartext or cached without protection; System prompts not stored in cleartext application configuration or source code

controls.title: Verify PII is identified and protected
controls.description: PII in LLM training data, RAG sources, and outputs identified and handled per policy

controls.title: Verify anti-CSRF tokens in state-changing operations
controls.description: CSRF protection on endpoints where LLM output triggers state changes

controls.title: Verify business logic rate limits
controls.description: Business logic controls on LLM usage � per-tenant cost budgets, rate limit policies

changelog.change: Initial seed — 32 ASVS verification requirements and sub-requirements
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
